characters.name: Blake Myers
characters.description: Blake MyersBackground informationFirst episodeLatest episodeGet Shrunk!(debut)Got Blake!VoiceRobbie Daymond(English)Julien Crampon(French)Ziyad Sharif(Arabic)Jesse Grimm(German)Luis Leonardo Suárez (Latin America)Nikos Papadopoulos (Greek)Prokhor Chekhovskoy(Russia)Mattia Bressan(Italian)Character informationFull nameBlake MyersOther namesWalter McOldSpace Commander Cutzy BabybuttAge13OccupationHuman AstronautAffiliationsMitch de la CruzGoalTo protect EarthTo be a space rangerTo winSkye'sloveTo defeat the evilSqualiens!HomeEarthRelativesDale Myers(father)Darla Myers(mother)Mrs. Myers(grandmother)Cave Blake(ancestor)PetsBuddy(formely)AlliesEnemiesMitch de la Cruz(best friend)Skye Gunderson(love interest)WandaZorkaFast EddyRodrigo de la CruzCarmen de la CruzDr. Björn GundersonIsabelle GundersonMaxusJeromeLeonardSqualien GeneralRoy Cronk(usually)LikesFun montagesNacho cheese (favorite food)Fighting SqualiensMitch de la CruzSkye GundersonHappy Valentine's DayFountainsDislikesSqualiensLavaBeing groundedHis family and friends in dangerPirates (his great phobia; formerly)Powers and abilitiesParkour skillsActobatHand-to-hand combatStrength and spped Blake Myersis the main protagonist of the Nickelodeon animated comedy television seriesGet Blake!who is voiced byRobbie Daymond. He is a 13 year old boy who dreams one day of being a space ranger to protect the Earth from the evilSqualiens. He along withMitch de la Cruzand the Squaliens appear in all episodes. He is very skilled at parkour. He is adventurous, brave, impulsive and appears to be very heroic and sometimes nice. He is always fighting Squaliens along with his friend Mitch.
